name: Mount Hood Memorial Park & Golf Course
about: Mount Hood Golf Club is a public golf course located in Melrose, Massachusetts, that features three state-of-the-art Trackman Indoor Golf Simulators within its historic clubhouse. The simulators are available year-round, providing a dedicated indoor golf experience, especially during the winter season. The venue offers hourly rentals for the simulator bays, complemented by a bar menu serving comfort food and cocktails, creating an atmosphere that blends golf with social dining. Patrons can book sessions individually or purchase a 'Sim Pak,' which provides a package of 10 half-hour sessions at a discounted rate.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology for accurate swing and ball data
Comfortable indoor setting available year-round, ideal for winter play
Food and beverage options available on-site, enhancing the social experience

food_and_drink.notes: Snack bar offers various food options, described as delicious comfort food.
Bar menu features top-pour cocktails and beverages.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three state-of-the-art Trackman simulators are available in the clubhouse.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs as they are not provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers a snack bar and full bar menu with food and drinks available for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: While a specific time for 18 holes is not mentioned, typical simulator sessions are booked by the hour, with a standard full round taking approximately 1-2 hours depending on the number of players.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue does not specifically mention child-friendly policies or activities, so it is unclear if it is suitable for children.
